contentBlocks.original:
धर्मो विवर्धति युधिष्ठिर कीर्तनेन
पापं प्रणश्यति वृकोदर कीर्तनेन ।
शत्रुर्विनश्यति धनंजय कीर्तनेन
मादीसुतौ कथयतां न भवंति रोगाः ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dharmo vivardhati yudhiṣṭhira kīrtanena
pāpaṃ praṇaśyati vṛkodara kīrtanena .
śatrurvinaśyati dhanaṃjaya kīrtanena
mādīsutau kathayatāṃ na bhavaṃti rogāḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation: Dharma grows with the praise of Yudhistira, sins die with the praise of Bhima, enemies are extinguished with the praise of Arjuna, there will be no ill-health with the praise of Nakula and Sahadeva.
contentBlocks.meanings: धर्मः (dharmaḥ) – righteousness; विवर्धति (vivardhati) – grows; युधिष्ठिर (yudhiṣṭhira) – Yudhishthira; कीर्तनेन (kīrtanena) – by the praise; पापम् (pāpam) – sin; प्रणश्यति (praṇaśyati) – is destroyed; वृकोदर (vṛkodara) – Bhima; कीर्तनेन (kīrtanena) – by the praise; शत्रुः (śatruḥ) – enemy; विनश्यति (vinaśyati) – is extinguished; धनंजय (dhanaṃjaya) – Arjuna; कीर्तनेन (kīrtanena) – by the praise; मादीसुतौ (mādīsutau) – sons of Madri (mādī:Madri | sutau:sons); कथयताम् (kathayatām) – by speaking; न (na) – not; भवंति (bhavanti) – become; रोगाः (rogāḥ) – diseases;
